title: jurinea tortisquamea
intro: Jurinea tortisquamea, a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, is native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Jurinea tortisquamea is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and is also believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Jurinea tortisquamea are typically made from the dried roots or whole plants, and can be consumed as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures.
